title: Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (disambiguation)
content:
'''''The Phantom Menace''''' may refer to:

*'''[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]''', the [[1999]] [[prequel trilogy]] film.
*The [[Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace (soundtrack)|soundtrack]] to the film.
==Legends==
<!--1999-04-21 RR-->*The [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace Illustrated Screenplay|Illustrated Screenplay]] for the film.
<!--1999-04-25 RR-->*''[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace Scrapbook]]''
<!--1999-05-03 N-->*The [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|novelization]] of the film.
**The [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (unabridged audiobook)|unabridged audio version]] of the novel.
**The [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (abridged audiobook)|abridged audio version]] of the novel.
<!--1999-05-03 N-->*The [[Episode I: The Phantom Menace (Mighty Chronicles)|Mighty Chronicles adaptation]] of the film.
<!--1999-05-03 JN-->*The [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (junior novelization)|junior novelization]] of the film.
<!--1999-05-03 YR-->*The [[Episode I: The Phantom Menace Movie Storybook|Movie Storybook adaptation]] of the film.
<!--1999-05-05 CB-->*The [[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (comic series)|comic adaptation]] of the film.
**The [[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (hardcover)|hardcover collection]] of the comic.
<!--1999-05-10 RR-->*''[[Star Wars: The Making of Episode I The Phantom Menace]]''
<!--1999-05-18 VG-->*The [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|video game adaptation]] of the film.
**The [[Prima Games|Prima]] [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|official strategy guide]] for the game.
<!--1999-05-19 RR-->*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace The Official Souvenir Magazine|The Official Souvenir Magazine]] for the film.
<!--1999-05-XX YR-->*The [[Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace (book-and-record)|book-and-record adaptation]] of the film.
<!--1999-06-18 RR-->*''[[Star Wars: Episode I: The Phantom Menace: The Official Souvenir Annual 2000]]''
<!--1999-07-21 CB-->*[[Episode I: The Phantom Menace ½|''Episode I: The Phantom Menace'' ½]]
<!--1999-09-07 RR-->*[[The Art of Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace]]
<!--1999-09-XX RR-->*''[[Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace Portfolio]]''
<!--1999-12-22 CB-->*The [[Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace|manga adaptation]] of the film.
<!--1999-XX-XX RR-->*The [[Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace (reference book)|reference book]] for the film.
<!--1999-XX-XX RR-->*The [[Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace promotional book|promotional book]] for the film.
<!--2000-02-XX RR-->*The [[Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace (script facsimile)|script facsimile]] for the film.
<!--2000-04-04 VD-->*The [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace Widescreen Video Collector's Edition|Widescreen Video Collector's Edition]] of the film.
<!--2003-10-01 SS-->*{{Tales|17|Phantom Menaces}}
<!--2005-11-XX CB-->*The [[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace Cine-Manga|Cine-Manga adaptation]] of the film.
<!--2012-01-01 YR-->*The [[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace 3D Storybook|3D Storybook adaptation]] of the film.
<!--2012-01-12 RR-->*''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]''
<!--2012-01-16 YR-->*The [[LEGO Star Wars: The Phantom Menace|LEGO children's book adaption]] of the film.
<!--2012-01-16 YR-->*''[[Ultimate Sticker Collection: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace]]''
<!--2012-02-02 RR-->*''[[Totally 20: The Phantom Menace]]''
*[[Music from Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace|Music from ''Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace'']]
*The [[The Phantom Menace (TCG)|trading card game]] for the film.
*[[The Phantom Menace (painting)|''The Phantom Menace'']], an in-universe painting similar to the film's poster.

==Canon==
<!--2014-04-22 VG-->*''[[Star Wars Journeys: The Phantom Menace]]'', a video game adapting the film.
<!--2015-04-07 NC-->*The [[William Shakespeare's The Phantom of Menace: Star Wars Part the First|Shakespeare adaption]] of the film.
<!--2015-07-28 NC-->*The [[The Phantom Menace (Little Golden Book)|Little Golden Book adaptation]] of the film.
<!--2016-01-20 JN-->*''[[The Phantom Menace - The Film Novel]]'', a [[Wikipedia:French language|French]] junior novelization of the film.
<!--2017-01-03 YR-->*The [[The Phantom Menace Read-Along Storybook and CD|Read-Along Storybook and CD adaptation]] of the film
<!--2017-05-17 JN-->*''[[The Phantom Menace (French junior novel)|The Phantom Menace]]'', another [[Wikipedia:French language|French]] junior novelization of the film.
<!--2018-12-18 RR-->*{{InsiderCite|186|Great Expectations: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace|Great Expectations: ''Star Wars: The Phantom Menace''}}
<!--2019-05-XX YR-->*The [[The Phantom Menace (Epic Adventures)|''Epic Adventures'' adaptation]] of the film.
<!--2021-07-13 GN-->*The [[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace Graphic Novel Adaptation|graphic novel adaptation]] of the film.
